TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ta´man ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 279 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 252 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Ta´man hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ta´man hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ta´man hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ta´man hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ ta*man ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
S.FORM: alang Ta´man ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 279 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 252 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Ta´man hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ta´man hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ta´man hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ta´man hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ ta*man ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ta*man ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
